FINALBOSS.DESCRIPTION: An animation sequence styled after Kefka's from Final Fantasy 6.
FINALBOSS.NAME: Final Boss

PURPLEDUST.DESCRIPTION: Turns the placeable purple, then they blow away like dust in the wind.
PURPLEDUST.NAME: Purple Dust

REDDISSOLVE.DESCRIPTION: Turns the placeable red, then dissolves it.
REDDISSOLVE.NAME: Red Dissolve
